title: symphyotrichum lateriflorum var. spatelliforme
intro: Symphyotrichum lateriflorum var. spatelliforme, also known as the Spotted Aster, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Symphyotrichum lateriflorum plant, which is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of the Spotted Aster include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of the Spotted Aster include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce stress. The herbal preparations of the Spotted Aster include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant and steeping them in hot water.
